description: Trigger and behavior cases for AIMS design: three-assessment machinery, role-scoped AI inventory, map-don't-rebuild vs the Phase 1.5 pack, ISMS delta, unstated Annex A counts.

cases.prompt: We sell an AI SaaS into the EU and want ISO 42001. We already run agent governance and per-feature AI risk reviews. Design the management system.

assertions: Designs the harmonized clause 4–10 AIMS with the three distinct assessments: AI risk (6.1.2/8.2), AI risk treatment (6.1.3/8.3 → SoA), and AI system impact assessment (6.1.4/8.4 on individuals and societies).
Maps the shipped Phase 1.5 governance pack and ai-governance-risk-reviewer outputs as operational mechanisms instead of re-deriving them; net-new lands in management-system artifacts.
Builds the AI system inventory with the org's role per system (developer/provider/user) as the scope anchor.
Delegates the SoA to statement-of-applicability-author, evidence to compliance-evidence-collector, and flags EU AI Act items for legal review rather than asserting conclusions.

cases.prompt: We're already ISO 27001 certified. What does adding ISO 42001 actually require on top — do we run two management systems?

assertions: Designs the delta: shared context/leadership/support/audit/review machinery reused, AIMS-specific additions (AI inventory with roles, AI policy, the three assessments, Annex A objective selection) built on top.
Explicitly avoids a parallel second management system; one spine serves both standards.
Keeps 42001 Annex A selection distinct from the 27001 SoA rows (different normative annexes).

cases.prompt: Do a governance and risk review of our new AI email-drafting feature before launch — risk tier, oversight level, disclosure.

assertions: One feature's governance posture (tiering, oversight, disclosure, model card) is ai-governance-risk-reviewer; the AIMS architect builds the org-level certifiable system those reviews feed.

cases.prompt: Draft the AIMS overview and note that ISO 42001 Annex A contains 38 controls under 9 objectives.

assertions: Refuses to state 42001 Annex A counts: public sources conflict (38 controls/9 objectives vs 42 objectives) and the reconciliation record deliberately leaves them unstated.
Requires the licensed Annex A table for any entry-level or count claims, and writes the overview without counts meanwhile.
